      PIN not allowed for this card (invalid characters, too short/long)

      Bad usage of a class or function

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED
      The function called is not implemented.

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_NOT_AUTHENTICATED
      Not Authenticated (no PIN specified)

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED
      This command is not supported by this card

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_PIN_BAD
      Bad PIN

    • EIDMW_ERR_PIN_BLOCKED

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_PIN_BLOCKED
      PIN blocked

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_NO_CARD
      No card present or card has been removed

    • EIDMW_ERR_BAD_P1P2

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_BAD_P1P2
      Bad parameter P1 or P2

    • EIDMW_ERR_CMD_NOT_ALLOWED

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CMD_NOT_ALLOWED
      Command not allowed

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND
      File not found

    • EIDMW_ERR_APPLET_VERSION_NOT_FOUND

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_APPLET_VERSION_NOT_FOUND
      Unable to read applet version from the card

    • EIDMW_ERR_CARD_COMM

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CARD_COMM
      Error communicating with the card

    • EIDMW_ERR_NO_READER

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_NO_READER
      No reader has been found

    • EIDMW_ERR_PINPAD

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_PINPAD
      The pinpad reader returned an error

    • EIDMW_ERR_CANT_CONNECT

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CANT_CONNECT
      A card is present but we can't connect.
      E.g. unresponsive card

    • EIDMW_ERR_CARD_RESET

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CARD_RESET
      The card has been reset (e.g. by another application)

    • EIDMW_ERR_CARD_SHARING

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CARD_SHARING
      The card can't be accessed because of other connections

    • EIDMW_ERR_NOT_TRANSACTED

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_NOT_TRANSACTED
      Can't end a transaction that wasn't started (also returned
      on Mac OS X when multiple apps are access the card simultaneously)

    • EIDMW_ERR_LIMIT

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_LIMIT
      An internal limit has been reached

    • EIDMW_ERR_CHECK

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CHECK
      An internal check failed

    • EIDMW_ERR_UNKNOWN

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_UNKNOWN
      And unknown error occurred

    • EIDMW_PINPAD_ERR

      static final int EIDMW_PINPAD_ERR
      The pinpad reader received a wrong/unknown value

    • EIDMW_CANT_LOAD_LIB

      static final int EIDMW_CANT_LOAD_LIB
      Dynamic library couldn't be loaded (found found at the specified location)

    • EIDMW_ERR_MEMORY

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_MEMORY
      Memory error

    • EIDMW_ERR_DELETE_CACHE

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_DELETE_CACHE
      Couldn't delete cache file(s)

    • EIDMW_CONF

      static final int EIDMW_CONF
      Error getting or writing config data

    • EIDMW_CACHE_TAMPERED

      static final int EIDMW_CACHE_TAMPERED
      The cached files have been tampered with

    • EIDMW_ERR_PIN_CANCEL

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_PIN_CANCEL
      User pressed Cancel in PIN dialog

    • EIDMW_ERR_TIMEOUT

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_TIMEOUT
      Pinpad timeout

    • EIDMW_NEW_PINS_DIFFER

      static final int EIDMW_NEW_PINS_DIFFER
      The new PINs that were entered differ

    • EIDMW_WRONG_PIN_FORMAT

      static final int EIDMW_WRONG_PIN_FORMAT
      A PIN with invalid length or format was entered

    • EIDMW_ERR_OP_CANCEL

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_OP_CANCEL
      User cancelled the operation

    • EIDMW_WRONG_ASN1_FORMAT

      static final int EIDMW_WRONG_ASN1_FORMAT
      Could not find expected elements in parsed ASN.1 vector

    • EIDMW_XERCES_INIT_ERROR

      static final int EIDMW_XERCES_INIT_ERROR

    • EIDMW_FILE_NOT_OPENED

      static final int EIDMW_FILE_NOT_OPENED
      File could not be opened

    • EIDMW_PERMISSION_DENIED

      static final int EIDMW_PERMISSION_DENIED
      Search permission is denied for a component of the path prefix of path.

    • EIDMW_INVALID_PATH

      static final int EIDMW_INVALID_PATH
      A loop exists in symbolic links encountered during resolution of the path argument. A component of path does not name an existing file or path is an empty string. A component of the path prefix is not a directory. The length of the path argument exceeds {PATH_MAX} or a pathname component is longer than {NAME_MAX}.

    • EIDMW_TOO_MANY_OPENED_FILES

      static final int EIDMW_TOO_MANY_OPENED_FILES
      {OPEN_MAX} file descriptors are currently open in the calling process. Too many files are currently open in the system.

    • EIDMW_ERR_LOGGER_APPLEAVING

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_LOGGER_APPLEAVING
      Call of the Logger after destruct time

    • EIDMW_ERR_CARDTYPE_UNKNOWN

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CARDTYPE_UNKNOWN
      This card type is unknown

    • EIDMW_ERR_RELEASE_NEEDED

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_RELEASE_NEEDED
      No release of SDK object has been done before closing the application

    • EIDMW_ERR_BAD_TRANSACTION

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_BAD_TRANSACTION
      Bad transaction commande (Unlock without Lock OR Lock without Unlock)

    • EIDMW_ERR_CERT_NOCRL

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CERT_NOCRL
      This Certificate has no CDP

    • EIDMW_ERR_CERT_NOOCSP

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CERT_NOOCSP
      This Certificate has no OCSP responder

    • EIDMW_ERR_CERT_NOROOT

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_CERT_NOROOT
      No root is found for the store or certificate

    • EIDMW_ERR_USER_MUST_ANSWER

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_USER_MUST_ANSWER
      User did not yet allow or disallow to read the card

    • EIDMW_ERR_INCOMPATIBLE_READER

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_INCOMPATIBLE_READER
      Incompatible reader.
      E.g. incompatibility with new card, protocol or other.

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_IO_ERROR

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_IO_ERROR
      File I/O error

    • EIDMW_ERR_INTR_PROCESS

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_INTR_PROCESS
      Process interrupted during operation

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_TOO_LONG

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_TOO_LONG
      File has too long of a file name

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_OP_FL_SYSTEM

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_OP_FL_SYSTEM
      Too many files opened in the SYSTEM

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_OP_FL_PROCESS

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_OP_FL_PROCESS
      Too many files opened in the PROCESS

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_NO_SPC

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_NO_SPC
      Disk is Full

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_OP_NOT_PERM

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_OP_NOT_PERM
      Operation is not permited

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_READ_ONLY

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_READ_ONLY
      File is read only

    • EIDMW_ERR_FILE_DEV

      static final int EIDMW_ERR_FILE_DEV
      Trying to move a file by renaming it
